# Jeannette Musselman Books

> Free Christian books and teachings centered around Jesus Christ and the New Covenant of Grace.

## About

This is the official website of Jeannette Musselman, a Christian author and teacher. All books are available as free PDF downloads. The site also features a blog with teachings and reflections on faith, grace, healing, and righteousness.

## Author

Jeannette Musselman is a Christian author and teacher with a deep love for hurting people and a desire to help believers understand the free gift of righteousness through Jesus Christ. Her books lead readers out from condemnation, guilt, and shame into the freedom of grace.

## Content

### Books (Free PDF Downloads)
- Sorrow to Everlasting Joy — For those struggling with sorrow, condemnation, guilt, or depression
- Freedom in Christ — Deep teaching on God's love through His Son Jesus
- New Creation in Christ — Seeing yourself as a new creation in Christ Jesus
- Receive God's Free Gift of Healing — Faith-building book on healing and wholeness
- Are You Clothed with the Armor of God? — Understanding the Armor of God from within
- Was JOB Self-Righteous? — Revelation from the Holy Spirit about the book of Job
- Who is the God of the Bible? — Scriptures revealing the Trinity and Jesus as God

### Blog
Teachings, reflections, and thoughts on grace, faith, and the New Covenant.

## URLs
- Homepage: https://jmbooks.online
- All Books: https://jmbooks.online/books
- Blog: https://jmbooks.online/blog
